name: Nella Tidehopper
summary: A curious, fearless child who dreamed of becoming a Tidewarden.
knownInfo: Nella was often seen around the Silvered Market.
She gave the party a simple good luck shell if they treated her kindly.
She dreamed of becoming a Tidewarden.
Her disappearance became the emotional center of Session 2.

name: Kella Tidehopper
summary: A hardworking mother known throughout the market district.
quote: Mothers know when something is wrong.
knownInfo: Kella is Nella's mother.
Citizens in the Silvered Market clearly know both mother and daughter.
Her grief after Nella's death deeply affects the party.

name: Captain Thalorin Tideborn
summary: A respected Tidewarden captain who guides and observes the recruits.
quote: A Tidewarden's duty is not to the throne. It is to the people sleeping safely because you stood watch.
knownInfo: Thalorin is one of the party's major academy authorities.
He is respected by recruits and Tidewardens.
He is protective, observant, and disciplined.

name: Commander Vaeloria Stormcurrent
summary: A disciplined commander responsible for preparing recruits for service.
quote: Atlantis is not protected by walls. It is protected by the people willing to stand upon them.
knownInfo: Vaeloria commands the academy.
She is demanding, disciplined, and protective of Atlantis.
On graduation day, she mobilizes recruits when Atlantis is attacked.

name: Sergeant Thalric Tideborn
summary: A gruff academy sergeant who trains recruits hard because he wants them to survive.
quote: If you're breathing, you're still learning. If you're not breathing, paperwork gets involved.
knownInfo: Thalric is one of the first authority figures the party encounters.
He is strict, sarcastic, and protective.
He runs academy discipline and training.

name: Lieutenant Neros Wavecrest
summary: A friendly officer who handles records, reports, and recruit paperwork.
quote: Every report tells a story. Most people simply forget to read it.
knownInfo: Neros works with academy and recruit records.
He is friendly, intelligent, and detail-oriented.
He remembers names, histories, and reports others overlook.

name: King Aurelion Veyrath IX
role: King of Atlantis and the Deep Realm
summary: The beloved Tide King of Atlantis, publicly viewed as wise, noble, and protective.
quote: A kingdom is measured not by its walls, but by how safely its people sleep.
knownInfo: Aurelion has ruled Atlantis for nearly three centuries.
Most citizens admire and trust him.
He gives a public address after Nella's death.

name: Cassia Pearlfin
summary: A confident, disciplined recruit and leader of Squad 9.
quote: Competence isn't arrogance if you're right.
knownInfo: Cassia leads Squad 9.
She is confident, competitive, and respected by her squad.
She begins as a rival recruit.

name: Lyra Moonreef
summary: A quick-witted and kind recruit from Squad 9.
quote: You're hiding something. I don't know what it is yet. But I will.
knownInfo: Lyra is a member of Squad 9.
She is observant, adventurous, and kind.
She becomes important during the Trench Beacon mission.
